content.text: I’ll locate the Kinesis retention implementation and the existing test structure first.

content.content:
1	package io.github.hectorvent.floci.services.kinesis;
2	
3	import io.github.hectorvent.floci.testing.RestAssuredJsonUtils;
4	import io.quarkus.test.junit.QuarkusTest;
5	import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeAll;
6	import org.junit.jupiter.api.MethodOrderer;
7	import org.junit.jupiter.api.Order;
8	import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
9	import org.junit.jupiter.api.TestMethodOrder;
10	
11	import static io.restassured.RestAssured.given;
12	import static org.hamcrest.Matchers.*;
13	
14	@QuarkusTest
15	@TestMethodOrder(MethodOrderer.OrderAnnotation.class)
16	class KinesisIntegrationTest {
17	
18	    private static final String KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE = "application/x-amz-json-1.1";
19	
20	    @BeforeAll
21	    static void configureRestAssured() {
22	        RestAssuredJsonUtils.configureAwsContentTypes();
23	    }
24	
25	    @Test
26	    @Order(1)
27	    void createStream() {
28	        given()
29	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.CreateStream")
30	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
31	            .body("""
32	                {"StreamName": "list-shards-test", "ShardCount": 2}
33	                """)
34	        .when()
35	            .post("/")
36	        .then()
37	            .statusCode(200);
38	    }
39	
40	    @Test
41	    @Order(2)
42	    void listShardsByStreamName() {
43	        given()
44	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.ListShards")
45	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
46	            .body("""
47	                {"StreamName": "list-shards-test"}
48	                """)
49	        .when()
50	            .post("/")
51	        .then()
52	            .statusCode(200)
53	            .body("Shards.size()", equalTo(2))
54	            .body("Shards[0].ShardId", equalTo("shardId-000000000000"))
55	            .body("Shards[1].ShardId", equalTo("shardId-000000000001"))
56	            .body("Shards[0].HashKeyRange.StartingHashKey", notNullValue())
57	            .body("Shards[0].HashKeyRange.EndingHashKey", equalTo("340282366920938463463374607431768211455"))
58	            .body("Shards[0].SequenceNumberRange.StartingSequenceNumber", notNullValue());
59	    }
60	
61	    @Test
62	    @Order(3)
63	    void listShardsByStreamArn() {
64	        String streamArn = given()
65	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.DescribeStreamSummary")
66	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
67	            .body("""
68	                {"StreamName": "list-shards-test"}
69	                """)
70	        .when()
71	            .post("/")
72	        .then()
73	            .statusCode(200)
74	            .extract().jsonPath().getString("StreamDescriptionSummary.StreamARN");
75	
76	        given()
77	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.ListShards")
78	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
79	            .body("{\"StreamARN\": \"" + streamArn + "\"}")
80	        .when()
81	            .post("/")
82	        .then()
83	            .statusCode(200)
84	            .body("Shards.size()", equalTo(2));
85	    }
86	
87	    @Test
88	    @Order(20)
89	    void describeStreamByArn() {
90	        String streamArn = given()
91	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.DescribeStreamSummary")
92	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
93	            .body("""
94	                {"StreamName": "list-shards-test"}
95	                """)
96	        .when()
97	            .post("/")
98	        .then()
99	            .statusCode(200)
100	            .extract().jsonPath().getString("StreamDescriptionSummary.StreamARN");
101	
102	        given()
103	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.DescribeStream")
104	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
105	            .body("{\"StreamARN\": \"" + streamArn + "\"}")
106	        .when()
107	            .post("/")
108	        .then()
109	            .statusCode(200)
110	            .body("StreamDescription.StreamName", equalTo("list-shards-test"))
111	            .body("StreamDescription.StreamARN", equalTo(streamArn));
112	    }
113	
114	    @Test
115	    @Order(21)
116	    void putAndGetRecordsByArn() {
117	        // Use a dedicated stream to avoid interference from shard splits on list-shards-test
118	        given()
119	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.CreateStream")
120	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
121	            .body("""
122	                {"StreamName": "arn-put-get-test", "ShardCount": 1}
123	                """)
124	        .when()
125	            .post("/")
126	        .then()
127	            .statusCode(200);
128	
129	        String streamArn = given()
130	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.DescribeStreamSummary")
131	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
132	            .body("""
133	                {"StreamName": "arn-put-get-test"}
134	                """)
135	        .when()
136	            .post("/")
137	        .then()
138	            .statusCode(200)
139	            .extract().jsonPath().getString("StreamDescriptionSummary.StreamARN");
140	
141	        // PutRecord by ARN
142	        given()
143	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.PutRecord")
144	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
145	            .body("{\"StreamARN\": \"" + streamArn + "\", \"Data\": \"dGVzdA==\", \"PartitionKey\": \"pk1\"}")
146	        .when()
147	            .post("/")
148	        .then()
149	            .statusCode(200)
150	            .body("SequenceNumber", notNullValue());
151	
152	        // GetShardIterator by ARN
153	        String iterator = given()
154	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.GetShardIterator")
155	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
156	            .body("{\"StreamARN\": \"" + streamArn + "\", \"ShardId\": \"shardId-000000000000\", \"ShardIteratorType\": \"TRIM_HORIZON\"}")
157	        .when()
158	            .post("/")
159	        .then()
160	            .statusCode(200)
161	            .extract().jsonPath().getString("ShardIterator");
162	
163	        // GetRecords to verify the put worked
164	        given()
165	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.GetRecords")
166	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
167	            .body("{\"ShardIterator\": \"" + iterator + "\"}")
168	        .when()
169	            .post("/")
170	        .then()
171	            .statusCode(200)
172	            .body("Records.size()", equalTo(1))
173	            .body("Records[0].PartitionKey", equalTo("pk1"))
174	            .body("Records[0].Data", equalTo("dGVzdA=="));
175	    }
176	
177	    @Test
178	    @Order(22)
179	    void operationWithoutStreamNameOrArnReturns400() {
180	        given()
181	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.DescribeStream")
182	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
183	            .body("{}")
184	        .when()
185	            .post("/")
186	        .then()
187	            .statusCode(400);
188	    }
189	
190	    @Test
191	    @Order(23)
192	    void operationWithMalformedArnReturns400() {
193	        given()
194	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.DescribeStream")
195	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
196	            .body("""
197	                {"StreamARN": "arn:aws:kinesis:us-east-1:123456789012:not-a-stream"}
198	                """)
199	        .when()
200	            .post("/")
201	        .then()
202	            .statusCode(400);
203	    }
204	
205	    @Test
206	    @Order(4)
207	    void listShardsAfterSplitReturnsAllShards() {
208	        given()
209	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.SplitShard")
210	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
211	            .body("""
212	                {
213	                    "StreamName": "list-shards-test",
214	                    "ShardToSplit": "shardId-000000000000",
215	                    "NewStartingHashKey": "170141183460469231731687303715884105728"
216	                }
217	                """)
218	        .when()
219	            .post("/")
220	        .then()
221	            .statusCode(200);
222	
223	        given()
224	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.ListShards")
225	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
226	            .body("""
227	                {"StreamName": "list-shards-test"}
228	                """)
229	        .when()
230	            .post("/")
231	        .then()
232	            .statusCode(200)
233	            .body("Shards.size()", equalTo(4));
234	    }
235	
236	    @Test
237	    @Order(5)
238	    void listShardsWithShardFilterAtLatestExcludesClosedShards() {
239	        given()
240	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.ListShards")
241	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
242	            .body("""
243	                {"StreamName": "list-shards-test", "ShardFilter": {"Type": "AT_LATEST"}}
244	                """)
245	        .when()
246	            .post("/")
247	        .then()
248	            .statusCode(200)
249	            .body("Shards.size()", equalTo(3))
250	            .body("Shards.findAll { !it.SequenceNumberRange.containsKey('EndingSequenceNumber') }.size()", equalTo(3));
251	    }
252	
253	    @Test
254	    @Order(6)
255	    void listShardsWithoutStreamNameOrArn() {
256	        given()
257	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.ListShards")
258	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
259	            .body("{}")
260	        .when()
261	            .post("/")
262	        .then()
263	            .statusCode(400);
264	    }
265	
266	    @Test
267	    @Order(7)
268	    void increaseStreamRetentionPeriod() {
269	        // Create a dedicated stream for retention tests
270	        given()
271	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.CreateStream")
272	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
273	            .body("""
274	                {"StreamName": "retention-test", "ShardCount": 1}
275	                """)
276	        .when()
277	            .post("/")
278	        .then()
279	            .statusCode(200);
280	
281	        // Increase from default 24 to 48
282	        given()
283	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.IncreaseStreamRetentionPeriod")
284	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
285	            .body("""
286	                {"StreamName": "retention-test", "RetentionPeriodHours": 48}
287	                """)
288	        .when()
289	            .post("/")
290	        .then()
291	            .statusCode(200);
292	
293	        // Verify via DescribeStream
294	        given()
295	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.DescribeStream")
296	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
297	            .body("""
298	                {"StreamName": "retention-test"}
299	                """)
300	        .when()
301	            .post("/")
302	        .then()
303	            .statusCode(200)
304	            .body("StreamDescription.RetentionPeriodHours", equalTo(48));
305	    }
306	
307	    @Test
308	    @Order(8)
309	    void decreaseStreamRetentionPeriod() {
310	        // Decrease from 48 back to 24
311	        given()
312	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.DecreaseStreamRetentionPeriod")
313	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
314	            .body("""
315	                {"StreamName": "retention-test", "RetentionPeriodHours": 24}
316	                """)
317	        .when()
318	            .post("/")
319	        .then()
320	            .statusCode(200);
321	
322	        // Verify
323	        given()
324	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.DescribeStream")
325	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
326	            .body("""
327	                {"StreamName": "retention-test"}
328	                """)
329	        .when()
330	            .post("/")
331	        .then()
332	            .statusCode(200)
333	            .body("StreamDescription.RetentionPeriodHours", equalTo(24));
334	    }
335	
336	    @Test
337	    @Order(9)
338	    void increaseRetentionPeriodRejectsTooHigh() {
339	        given()
340	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.IncreaseStreamRetentionPeriod")
341	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
342	            .body("""
343	                {"StreamName": "retention-test", "RetentionPeriodHours": 9999}
344	                """)
345	        .when()
346	            .post("/")
347	        .then()
348	            .statusCode(400)
349	            .body("__type", equalTo("InvalidArgumentException"));
350	    }
351	
352	    @Test
353	    @Order(10)
354	    void decreaseRetentionPeriodRejectsTooLow() {
355	        given()
356	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.DecreaseStreamRetentionPeriod")
357	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
358	            .body("""
359	                {"StreamName": "retention-test", "RetentionPeriodHours": 12}
360	                """)
361	        .when()
362	            .post("/")
363	        .then()
364	            .statusCode(400)
365	            .body("__type", equalTo("InvalidArgumentException"));
366	    }
367	
368	    @Test
369	    @Order(11)
370	    void increaseRetentionPeriodRejectsLowerValue() {
371	        // First increase to 48
372	        given()
373	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.IncreaseStreamRetentionPeriod")
374	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
375	            .body("""
376	                {"StreamName": "retention-test", "RetentionPeriodHours": 48}
377	                """)
378	        .when()
379	            .post("/")
380	        .then()
381	            .statusCode(200);
382	
383	        // Try to "increase" to 24 (lower) - should fail
384	        given()
385	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.IncreaseStreamRetentionPeriod")
386	            .contentType(KINESIS_CONTENT_TYPE)
387	            .body("""
388	                {"StreamName": "retention-test", "RetentionPeriodHours": 24}
389	                """)
390	        .when()
391	            .post("/")
392	        .then()
393	            .statusCode(400)
394	            .body("__type", equalTo("InvalidArgumentException"));
395	    }
396	
397	    @Test
398	    @Order(12)
399	    void listShardsForNonExistentStream() {
400	        given()
401	            .header("X-Amz-Target", "Kinesis_20131202.ListShards")

405	                """)

409	            .statusCode(400);
410	    }
411	}

content.content: The file /testbed/src/test/java/io/github/hectorvent/floci/services/kinesis/KinesisIntegrationTest.java has been updated successfully.

lines: -        // Requesting the current retention period should succeed without changing it.

input.description: Verify final diff after removing test

content.text:
Implemented the Kinesis retention no-op fix.

What changed:
- Updated `KinesisService.increaseStreamRetentionPeriod(...)` so:
  - Requested retention greater than current: still increases and persists.
  - Requested retention lower than current: still returns `InvalidArgumentException`.
  - Requested retention equal to current: now returns successfully without persisting changes, matching real AWS behavior.

Validation:
